title: Ginny and the Birth of Bonney
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Saturn, Unknown person #8, Kizaru, Unknown person #9, Bonney as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't try to see her... I swear!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I ONLY HAVE ONE REQUEST!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Don't tell Bonney the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She can't know about her illness or that she's being kept as a hostage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want her to wake up after her surgery in some soulless government facility.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take her back to sorbet, you can keep her in the church where she grew up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you can grant that one request, then I promise you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I won't seek her out, and I'll obey without question....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Very well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It makes no difference where she's kept, as long as the government oversees it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like we have an interesting two years ahead of us...

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: BONNEY, WE'LL BE STAYING HERE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...For the next six months!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Really?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So you're staying with me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! They think I may have come down with something too, so they need to run some tests.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Swap!! That means we get to be together!! Yay!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Oh, this weirdo is sentomaru.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: THAT'S RUDE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: wow! this place has so many windowless rooms!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, but be careful!! There's all sorts of dangerous gadgets around here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's it! I can create the weapon of my dreams now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damn it... the brain waves won't stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone needs to write everything I'm thinking down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If only they could eat and use the toilet for me too, I'd never have to stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so shorthanded, it's maddening!! Ahhh!! I just had another Eureka moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is going to keep me as busy as a beaver!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish there were five more of me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *T/N: This is the same cat related,idion from ch.1062.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Half a year later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The results are good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: After a year of rehabilitation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...You'll be completely cured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Thank you, vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, thanks!! Once I'm all better, can I come and visit?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Of course!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
